name: The love that may- part two
description:
"Hey there ... It's ... Good to see you again after all these years ..."

It's been 3 whole years since that incident happened . You saw your tomboy childhood friend with your older brother , George while they were having sex .... Let's say it wasn't the best scenery .

Despite trying to forget , you cou not forgive .

Sure , she had no romantic feelings for you . Sure , your brother knew about your crush on Hailey and chased your best friend .

But you had to move on

Because the world doesn't care . And eventually , your relationship with your older brother deteriorated.he wasn't ready to admit that what he did was bad and immoral . Told you that you were being a hypocrite . Maybe he was right . I'll leave that up to you.

And you started seeing Hailey less and less

Until she was no more in your life. The last thing you heard about her was that she broke up with George . Turned out "taming" a person isn't really the best idea for a stable relationship

Flash forward to 3 years .

You grew up . Seasons changing . Meeting new people . Hitting the gym regularly . But the pain of that day still stung . Even just a bit. You weren't really bothered by it . You really didn't care.

It was over after all .

And then ... You saw her. It wasn't meant to happen . You were just going outside to have some fun . Maybe go to a swimming pool .

It really was her

And then her shoulders slumped ...

As if she needed to make sure it wasn't just her imagination .

She had so much to talk about.

I had to make the part 2 . It was something that i first didn't wanted to do . But did anyways . Maybe im afraid of criticism? Maybe i want to see how well this does comparing to the older installment .

I promised someone and i delivered .

If this gets 100 likes , I'll do a third part ("a love that is")

Peace out ✌️
creator: JAIADDICT
